description: Sample user stories for testing the search API. Use these to validate that relevant test cases are returned.

stories.text: As a user, I want to add a promo code at checkout so I can get a discount on my order
As a user, I want to reset my password so I can regain access to my account
As a user, I want to search for products and filter by category
As a user, I want to buy an item as a guest without creating an account
As an admin, I want to update product stock levels so customers see accurate availability
